overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The player character crosses a wet intersection and walks along streets lined with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and reflective pavement before turning onto a narrower side street.

events.description: pedestrian crosses the crosswalk from left to right in front of the camera
blue sports car drives past from right to left through the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow crosswalk markings through the wet intersection

notable_agents.action: woman in light clothing walking across the crosswalk
blue sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with prominent vertical red neon signage near the top
elevated concrete highway overpass with massive support pillars
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
tall black pole with bright overhead street light illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with the player crossing yellow crosswalk markings on wet asphalt. A pedestrian crosses from the left while a blue sports car drives through the intersection. Towering cyberpunk skyscrapers with neon signage rise in the background beneath an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: main avenue with digital billboard facades

events.description: black armored vehicle pulls out and drives ahead on the street
overhead highway signs for Watson and Little China become visible

agents.ego_description: walking straight along the avenue passing large digital advertisements on the left building facades

notable_agents.action: black armored vehicle driving slowly ahead on the road

entered.detail: tall building completely covered in large glowing digital advertisements and holographic displays
palm trees illuminated with cyan neon lighting at their bases along the sidewalk
overhead directional signs with cyan neon text indicating Watson and Little China districts

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide main avenue lined with towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements. Neon-lit palm trees line the left sidewalk while a black armored vehicle drives ahead. Overhead highway signs indicate the Watson district as the player approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrower side street with vertical billboards and storefronts

events.description: camera turns right onto a narrower side street away from the main avenue
pedestrian walks across the path ahead from right to left

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and proceeding down a narrower street with storefronts and street vendors

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the street ahead

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying a woman with text NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE!
small street cart with umbrella and goods displayed on the sidewalk corner
building entrance with green neon lighting and glass doors at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The player turns right onto a narrower side street, leaving the wide avenue behind. A large vertical billboard advertising upgrades dominates the right side while a street vendor cart sits on the left corner. The street becomes more enclosed with storefronts featuring neon signage, and a pedestrian crosses ahead as the player continues down the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, bustling city intersection into the enclosed atmosphere of a neon-lit side street. It begins by crossing yellow markings on wet asphalt, passing a blue sports car and a pedestrian beneath the looming shadow of an elevated highway and towering skyscrapers. As the camera moves forward along a wide main avenue, the environment expands into a corridor of massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements, flanked by neon-lit palm trees and passing armored vehicles. The scene then shifts as the player turns right, leaving the open avenue behind to enter a narrower street dominated by a large vertical upgrade billboard and a street vendor cart. Finally, the perspective pushes further into the city's depths, moving past glowing storefronts and crossing pedestrians along the reflective, rain-slicked pavement.
